tests.name: defineFlags rejects a requirement on an unknown flag at definition time
defineFlags rejects dependency cycles at definition time
resolveFlags enables a flag only when all transitive requirements are enabled
resolveFlags suppresses the whole downstream chain when a root is off
resolveFlags treats flags missing from the state as disabled
resolveFlags reports a shared ancestor once in a diamond dependency
resolveFlags rejects state keys that were never defined
resolveFlags shows an all-ring flag to every viewer, anonymous included
resolveFlags shows a reviewer-ring flag to reviewers and admins but no lower
resolveFlags confines an admin-ring flag to admins
resolveFlags propagates a requirement hidden by its ring to its dependents
buildConfig parses defaults into a typed config
buildConfig lets later sources override earlier ones, deep-merged per key
buildConfig fails fast with the offending path when validation fails
buildConfig fails fast when a required key is missing entirely
buildConfig returns a deeply frozen object
envSource converts prefixed variables into a nested partial, camelizing keys
envSource merges sibling variables under one section
envSource returns an empty object when nothing matches the prefix
envSource ignores variables with undefined values
